answer:
\boxed{C}

Tahu was originally an Av-Matoran from Mata Nui’s island of Mata Nui before being transformed into the Toa of Light by the Great Spirit. This role was later expanded in *Bionicle Legends* and other lore, solidifying his identity as the Toa of Light. The other options (Vakama, Takua, Jaller) are associated with different Toa roles (Maha, Nokama, and Rahi, respectively).
